Off Calendar Dec-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HENNESSY INDUSTRIES, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, ALTERNATIVELY, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES.
APPEARANCES: Laurel Halbany, Esq. of Brayton Purcell, LLP 898-1555 for pltf & opposing party; Michael J. Plocki, Esq. of Gordon & Rees LLP 986-5900 for deft & moving party.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. THE SEPARATE STATEMENT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 3.1350. DEFENDANT FAILS TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE BY RELIANCE ON RESPONSES TO GENERAL INTERROGATORY RESPONSES. Order signed in open court. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Rhonda Aquilina, CSR 9956
